docs.title: MORAI ROS1 Messages Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation for the MORAI ROS1 message and service definitions package.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: The morai_msgs package provides ROS1 message and service definitions for interfacing with MORAI SIM: Drive, an autonomous driving simulator. This package enables communication between ROS1 nodes and the MORAI simulator for vehicle control, sensor data, and simulation management.

docs.title: Notice
docs.text:
This Github pages site only contains definitions for quick and easy reference, and is an auto-generated site. For more in-depth explanation, also refer to the main documentation.

Do note, however the main docs are not version controlled. This site is used to track version changes instead.

docs.title: Messages
docs.text:
The package includes 91 message definitions organized into the following categories:

  • Control Messages: Vehicle control commands (CtrlCmd, GVDirectCmd, GVStateCmd)
  • Vehicle Status: Real-time vehicle state information (EgoVehicleStatus, VehicleSpec, Lamps)
  • Collision & Safety: Collision detection and safety metrics (CollisionData, VehicleCollision, SVADC)
  • Traffic & Infrastructure: Traffic lights and intersections (GetTrafficLightStatus, SetTrafficLight, IntersectionControl)
  • Perception & Sensors: Sensor data and object detection (ObjectStatus, RadarDetection, GPSMessage)
  • Simulation Control: Simulator configuration and events (ScenarioLoad, EventInfo, ReplayInfo)
  • Ghost & NPC: Non-player character control (GhostMessage, NpcGhostCmd, NpcGhostInfo)
  • Map: Map specifications (MapSpec)
  • Sync Mode: Synchronous simulation control (SyncModeCmd, WaitForTick)
  • Fault Injection: Fault injection testing (FaultInjection_Controller, FaultInjection_Sensor)
  • Specialized Vehicles: Platform-specific messages (Skateboard, SkidSteer6wUGV, Ship, PR)
  • Robot & Delivery: Robot and delivery systems (DillyCmd, ManipulatorControl, RobotState)

docs.title: Services
docs.text: The package includes 19 service definitions for event management, map queries, simulation control, traffic lights, vehicle specs, sync mode, fault injection, and more.

docs.title: Compatibility
docs.text: These message definitions are compatible with ROS1 Melodic or later. They have been tested with ROS1 Noetic on Ubuntu 20.04.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
# Clone into your catkin workspace
cd ~/catkin_ws/src
git clone https://github.com/MORAI-Autonomous/MORAI-ROS_morai_msgs.git morai_msgs

# Build
cd ~/catkin_ws
catkin_make

# Source
source devel/setup.bash

docs.title: Messages Overview
docs.text: This section contains documentation for all ROS1 message definitions in the morai_msgs package.

docs.title: Control Messages
docs.text:
Messages for controlling vehicle motion and behavior:

  • CtrlCmd - Main vehicle control command
  • GVDirectCmd - Direct control for skid-steer ground vehicles
  • GVStateCmd - State control for skid-steer ground vehicles
  • VelocityCmd - Velocity command with linear and angular components
  • WheelControl - Per-wheel steering and RPM control

docs.title: Vehicle Status
docs.text:
Messages containing real-time vehicle state information:

  • EgoVehicleStatus - Ego vehicle status telemetry
  • EgoVehicleStatusExtended - Extended ego vehicle status with wheel speeds
  • EgoDdVehicleStatus - Differential-drive vehicle status
  • VehicleSpec - Vehicle specifications
  • VehicleSpecIndex - Vehicle specification query
  • Lamps - Vehicle lamp control
  • ERP42Info - ERP42 robot platform status

docs.title: Collision & Safety
docs.text:
Messages related to collision detection and safety:

  • CollisionData - Ego vehicle collision data
  • VehicleCollision - NPC vehicle collision event
  • VehicleCollisionData - NPC vehicle collision data container
  • SVADC - Safety violation and driving compliance counters

docs.title: Traffic & Infrastructure
docs.text:
Messages for traffic lights and infrastructure control:

  • GetTrafficLightStatus - Query traffic light status
  • SetTrafficLight - Set traffic light state
  • TrafficLight - Basic traffic light information
  • MoraiTLInfo - Traffic light service response
  • MoraiTLIndex - Traffic light service request
  • IntersectionControl - Intersection control command
  • IntersectionStatus - Intersection status
  • IntscnTL - Intersection traffic light states

docs.title: Perception & Sensors
docs.text:
Messages for sensor data and object detection:

  • ObjectStatus - Single object state
  • ObjectStatusList - List of nearby objects
  • ObjectStatusExtended - Extended single object state
  • ObjectStatusListExtended - Extended list of nearby objects
  • RadarDetection - Single radar detection point
  • RadarDetections - Array of radar detections
  • GPSMessage - GPS position data
  • SensorPosControl - Sensor position control
  • TOF - Time-of-flight sensor measurement
  • Obstacle - Static obstacle with dimensions
  • Obstacles - Array of static obstacles
  • Transforms - Array of stamped transforms

docs.title: Simulation Control
docs.text:
Messages for simulator configuration and management:

  • MoraiSimProcHandle - Simulator process control
  • MoraiSimProcStatus - Simulator process status
  • MoraiSrvResponse - Generic service response
  • ScenarioLoad - Scenario loading
  • EventInfo - Event control information
  • ReplayInfo - Replay data
  • SaveSensorData - Save sensor data configuration
  • MultiEgoSetting - Multi-ego vehicle settings
  • ExternalForce - External force application

docs.title: Ghost & NPC
docs.text:
Messages for non-player character control:

  • GhostMessage - Ghost vehicle re-simulation
  • NpcGhostCmd - NPC ghost command container
  • NpcGhostInfo - NPC ghost vehicle information

docs.title: Map
docs.text:
Messages for map specifications:

  • MapSpec - Map coordinate system specification
  • MapSpecIndex - Map specification query

docs.title: Sync Mode
docs.text:
Messages for synchronous simulation mode:

  • SyncModeCmd - Start/stop sync mode
  • SyncModeCmdResponse - Sync mode command response
  • SyncModeCtrlCmd - Vehicle control in sync mode
  • SyncModeInfo - Sync mode status
  • SyncModeAddObject - Add object in sync mode
  • SyncModeRemoveObject - Remove object in sync mode
  • SyncModeResultResponse - Sync operation result
  • SyncModeScenarioLoad - Load scenario in sync mode
  • SyncModeSetGear - Set gear in sync mode
  • WaitForTick - Wait for simulation tick
  • WaitForTickResponse - Tick wait response

docs.title: Fault Injection
docs.text:
Messages for fault injection testing:

  • FaultInjection_Controller - Controller fault injection
  • FaultInjection_Response - Fault injection response
  • FaultInjection_Sensor - Sensor fault injection
  • FaultInjection_Tire - Tire fault injection
  • FaultStatusInfo - Overall fault status
  • FaultStatusInfo_Overall - Subsystem fault status
  • FaultStatusInfo_Sensor - Sensor fault status
  • FaultStatusInfo_Vehicle - Vehicle subsystem fault status

docs.title: Specialized Vehicles
docs.text:
Messages for platform-specific vehicles:

  • SkateboardCtrlCmd - Skateboard vehicle control
  • SkateboardStatus - Skateboard vehicle status
  • DdCtrlCmd - Differential-drive control
  • SkidSteer6wUGVCtrlCmd - 6-wheel skid-steer UGV control
  • SkidSteer6wUGVStatus - 6-wheel skid-steer UGV status
  • UGVServeSkidCtrlCmd - UGV skid/Ackermann control
  • ShipCtrlCmd - Ship control command
  • ShipState - Ship state telemetry
  • PRCtrlCmd - Personal robot control
  • PRStatus - Personal robot status
  • PREvent - Personal robot event

docs.title: Robot & Delivery
docs.text:
Messages for robot and delivery systems:

  • DillyCmd - Dilly delivery command
  • DillyCmdResponse - Dilly command response
  • WoowaDillyStatus - Dilly delivery robot status
  • ManipulatorControl - 6-axis manipulator control
  • RobotOutput - Robot output status flags
  • RobotState - Robot operational state
  • Conveyor - Conveyor belt state
  • CMDConveyor - Conveyor sensor status

docs.title: Multi-Play
docs.text:
Messages for multi-player sessions:

  • MultiPlayEventRequest - Multi-play event request
  • MultiPlayEventResponse - Multi-play event response

docs.title: RadarDetection
docs.text:
Message Type: morai_msgs/RadarDetection

This message relates only to FMCW radar. All variables below are relative to the radar's frame of reference. This message is not meant to be used alone but as part of a stamped or array message. Object classifications (Additional vendor-specific classifications are permitted starting from 32000 eg. Car)

docs.title: Message Definition
docs.text:
# This message relates only to FMCW radar.  
# All variables below are relative to the radar's frame of reference.
# This message is not meant to be used alone but as part of a stamped or array message.

# Object classifications (Additional vendor-specific classifications are permitted starting from 32000 eg. Car)

uint16 detection_id                       # Index of each radar detection point
geometry_msgs/Point position              # x, y, z position of each radar detection point

float32 azimuth                           # azimuth angle of each radar detection point in Degree
float32 rangerate                         # relative velocity of the radar detected target w.r.t radial direction
float32 amplitude                         # amplitude of the reflected signal of the radar detected target(rcs)

docs.title: Field Descriptions
docs.text: Field Type Description detection_id uint16 Index of each radar detection point position geometry_msgs/Point x, y, z position of each radar detection point azimuth float32 azimuth angle of each radar detection point in Degree rangerate float32 relative velocity of the radar detected target w.r.t radial direction amplitude float32 amplitude of the reflected signal of the radar detected target(rcs)

docs.title: Services Overview
docs.text: This section contains documentation for all ROS1 service definitions in the morai_msgs package.

docs.title: Simulation Management
docs.text:
• MoraiScenarioLoadSrv - Load simulation scenarios
  • MoraiSimProcSrv - Control simulator process lifecycle
  • MoraiEventCmdSrv - Send event commands to simulator

docs.title: Sync Mode
docs.text:
• MoraiSyncModeCmdSrv - Start/stop sync mode
  • MoraiWaitForTickSrv - Wait for simulation tick
  • MoraiSyncModeCtrlCmdSrv - Vehicle control in sync mode
  • MoraiSyncModeSetGearSrv - Set gear in sync mode
  • MoraiSyncModeSLSrv - Load scenario in sync mode
  • MoraiSyncModeAddObjectSrv - Add object in sync mode
  • MoraiSyncModeRemoveObjectSrv - Remove object in sync mode

docs.title: Fault Injection
docs.text:
• FaultInjectionCtrlSrv - Inject controller faults
  • FaultInjectionSensorSrv - Inject sensor faults
  • FaultInjectionTireSrv - Inject tire faults

docs.title: Specialized
docs.text:
• PREventSrv - Personal robot events
  • MultiPlayEventSrv - Multi-play events
  • WoowaDillyEventCmdSrv - Dilly delivery robot events
